mods.name: Performance Air Intake
mods.description: An upgraded intake for the FA24 engine improves throttle response and adds a satisfying induction sound during spirited driving.
mods.installNotes: Remove stock airbox. Install new intake tube and filter. Ensure MAF sensor is properly seated in the new housing. 15 minutes. No tune needed.

mods.name: Catback Exhaust
mods.description: The stock exhaust is very quiet. An aftermarket catback adds character and volume to the FA24 boxer engine without excessive drone.
mods.partNumbers: Invidia N1 HS22GR8GST, GReddy Supreme SP
mods.installNotes: Bolt-on from the over-pipe back. Dual exit matches factory bumper cutouts. No cutting or welding. 45 minutes on jack stands.

mods.name: Lowering Springs
mods.description: Drop the GR86 by 20–25mm to reduce the factory wheel gap and improve handling with lower center of gravity.
mods.partNumbers: Swift Spec-R Springs 4T914, Eibach Pro-Kit E10-72-014-02-22
mods.installNotes: Spring compressor required. Swap all four corners. Rear springs are straightforward. Front requires unbolting the strut assembly. Alignment required after install.

mods.name: Performance Header (UEL)
mods.description: An unequal-length header adds the classic boxer rumble while improving exhaust scavenging for mid-range power gains on the FA24.
mods.installNotes: Access from below. Remove heat shields and unbolt stock manifold. Apply anti-seize to all studs. Requires tune to optimize and clear CEL from removed secondary cat. 3 hour install.

mods.name: ECU Tune (EcuTek/OFT)
mods.description: An ECU tune optimizes fueling, ignition timing, and throttle mapping for the FA24. Addresses the stock torque dip and adds 15–25hp with bolt-ons.
mods.partNumbers: EcuTek ProECU License, Openflash Tablet OFT2
mods.installNotes: Flash via OBD-II port. Select map matching your hardware (intake + header + exhaust). Eliminates the factory rev hang and improves throttle response. Requires 93 octane.

mods.name: Adjustable Coilovers
mods.description: Full coilover suspension for the GR86 with ride height and damping adjustment. Transforms the already excellent chassis into a track weapon.
mods.partNumbers: KW V3 35258003, Fortune Auto 500 Series FA500-86
mods.installNotes: Full strut replacement at all corners. Set initial drop to 20mm. Swift springs in 7k/5k rates work well for street/track dual duty. Alignment and corner balance recommended.

mods.name: Forced Induction (Supercharger)
mods.description: A centrifugal supercharger adds 60–100hp to the FA24 while maintaining the linear power delivery. The factory engine handles boost well with proper tuning.
mods.partNumbers: Edelbrock E-Force 15175, Jackson Racing C38-86 Kit
mods.installNotes: Full kit includes supercharger, intercooler, fuel injectors, and ECU tune. Oil catch can recommended. Upgraded clutch needed for manual cars. 10+ hour install. Maintain stock compression.

mods.name: Lightweight Wheels and Tires
mods.description: Lightweight forged wheels reduce unsprung mass for sharper turn-in and acceleration. The GR86 is incredibly sensitive to wheel weight changes.
mods.installNotes: Direct bolt-on with factory hub-centric rings for some brands. 17x9 with 245-width tires is the sweet spot. Ensure no fender rubbing at your ride height. Torque lugs to 89 ft-lbs.
